name: rejects an out-of-enum probe answer with a usage error and names the allowed values
command: bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/full-surface-intake.sh" --workload "React SPA" --answers p.json --probe-answer react_rendering_model=WRONG --partial --out x.json --now 2026-07-04T00:00:00Z 2>e.err; rc=$?; [ "$rc" -eq 2 ] && grep -q 'invalid=react_rendering_model' e.err && echo bad-probe-rejected 1>&2
setup: printf '%s' '{"workload":"React SPA with REST API on Kubernetes via Terraform","motivation":"revenue","criticality":"mission-critical","availability_tolerance":"minutes","data_loss_tolerance":"minutes","data_sensitivity":"confidential","compliance_regime":"soc2","scale":"large","budget_posture":"balanced"}' > p.json
